attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS END_TV_DT,
CASE	
	WHEN	 SUBSTR(NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,1,8) ='Standard'
  THEN
CASE	
	WHEN	   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE='Demo' THEN 'Y'
	WHEN	  NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE= 'Evaluation' THEN 'Y' 
	WHEN	 NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE= 'Int''l Demo' THEN 'Y'
	WHEN	 NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE='Intl Demo' THEN 'Y'
	ELSE	 'N'
END	
	ELSE	 'N'
END	   DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG,
CASE	
	WHEN	 SUBSTR(NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,1,11) ='Replacement'
  THEN
CASE	
	WHEN	   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE='Demo' THEN 'Y'
	WHEN	  NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE= 'Evaluation' THEN 'Y' 
	WHEN	 NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE= 'Int''l Demo' THEN 'Y'
	WHEN	 NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE='Intl Demo' THEN 'Y'
	ELSE	 'N'
END	
	ELSE	 'N'
END	  DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG,
CASE	
	WHEN	 NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL 
 THEN 'N' 
	ELSE	 NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG
END	  DD_REVENUE_FLAG,
CASE	   
	WHEN	 NSOT.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME ='EC ACQUISITION'
             THEN 'Y'
	WHEN	 NSOT.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME = 'ACQUISITION CONVERSION' 
             THEN 'Y'
	WHEN	 NSOT.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME ='BACKLOG CONVERSION'
              THEN 'Y'
	ELSE	 'N'         
END	  DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG,
CASE
		WHEN	  PARTY.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG= 'I' 
			THEN 'N'
		WHEN	  PARTY.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG IS NULL
			THEN 'N'
	ELSE	'Y'
END  DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG ,
NSOT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSOT.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
NSOT.SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
NSOT.CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME,
NSOT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
NSOT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSOT.SS_CODE,
NSOT.CANCELLED_FLAG,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
NSOT.ORDER_DATETIME,
NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
NSOT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSOT.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER,
USER,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME
FROM	 
(
SELECT
DISTINCT
NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS  BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
NSO.SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME AS SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
NSO.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
NSO.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME  AS BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME ,
NSO.CANCELLED_FLAG AS CANCELLED_FLAG ,
NSO.CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE AS CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE ,
NSO.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
NSO.CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME AS CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME,
NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
NSO.ORDER_DATETIME AS ORDER_DATETIME,
NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE AS SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE AS SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AS SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSO.SS_CODE AS SS_CODE,
NSO.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE ,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME
FROM	 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSO,
                $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
WHERE NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
       AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'  
       AND NSOL.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00' 
	AND NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'
	AND	 NSO.CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE='N'  
	and  coalesce ( nso.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD, '=') <>'CLOSED'
	AND	 NSO.CANCELLED_FLAG<>'Y' 
	AND  NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME >='2001-07-29 00:00:00'
	AND NSO.SS_CODE NOT IN ('CG','OPL') /* Added as part of OM LSS Project */ /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
	AND NSOL.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
	) NSOT
CROSS JOIN 
(
SELECT	 NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM, $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
WHERE	 NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
	AND	 NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT) FMNI
INNER JOIN
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV  NSOTT
	ON	( NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
	AND	 NSOTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
LEFT OUTER JOIN (  
SELECT	 NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
                                    NCA.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG  INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV NCA,
               $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY_TV NEP
WHERE	  NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
	AND	  NCA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' 
	AND	 NEP.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' 
	AND	  NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME NOT LIKE '%REGRESSION%TEST%' )   PARTY
	ON	 NSOT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=PARTY.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY

SELECT
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS END_TV_DT,
'=' DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG,
'=' DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG,
/*CASE	
	WHEN	 NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL 
 THEN 'N' 
	ELSE	 NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG
END	 */ '=' DD_REVENUE_FLAG,
CASE	   
	WHEN	 NSOT.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME ='EC ACQUISITION'
             THEN 'Y'
	WHEN	 NSOT.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME = 'ACQUISITION CONVERSION' 
             THEN 'Y'
	WHEN	 NSOT.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME ='BACKLOG CONVERSION'
              THEN 'Y'
	ELSE	 'N'         
END	  DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG,
CASE
		WHEN	  PARTY.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG= 'I' 
			THEN 'N'
		WHEN	  PARTY.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG IS NULL
			THEN 'N'
	ELSE	'Y'
END  DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG ,
NSOT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSOT.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
NSOT.SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
NSOT.CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME,
NSOT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
NSOT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSOT.SS_CODE,
NSOT.CANCELLED_FLAG,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
NSOT.ORDER_DATETIME,
NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
NSOT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSOT.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER,
USER,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME 
FROM	 
(
SELECT
DISTINCT
NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS  BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
NSO.SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME AS SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
NSO.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
NSO.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME  AS BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME ,
NSO.CANCELLED_FLAG AS CANCELLED_FLAG ,
NSO.CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE AS CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE ,
NSO.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
NSO.CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME AS CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME,
NSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME AS ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
NSO.ORDER_DATETIME AS ORDER_DATETIME,
NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE AS SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE AS SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AS SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSO.SS_CODE AS SS_CODE,
NSO.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME AS SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME
FROM	 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSO,
                $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
WHERE NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
       AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'  
       AND NSOL.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00' 
	AND NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'
	AND	 NSO.CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE='N'  
	and  coalesce ( nso.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD, '=') <>'CLOSED'
	AND	 NSO.CANCELLED_FLAG<>'Y' 
	AND  NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME >='2001-07-29 00:00:00'
	AND NSO.SS_CODE='CG'
	AND NSO.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
	AND NSOL.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
	) NSOT
CROSS JOIN 
(
SELECT	 NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM, $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
WHERE	 NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
	AND	 NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT) FMNI
INNER JOIN
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV  NSOTT
	ON	( NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
	AND	 NSOTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
LEFT OUTER JOIN (  
SELECT	 NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
                                    NCA.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG  INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV NCA,
               $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY_TV NEP
WHERE	  NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
	AND	  NCA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' 
	AND	 NEP.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' 
	AND	  NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME NOT LIKE '%REGRESSION%TEST%' )   PARTY
	ON	 NSOT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=PARTY.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
WHERE CAST (NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE) <= FMNI.PROCESS_DATE
